arts.ttl: Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are reluctant to pull the brakes on their effort to sign Patrick Dorgu despite seeing their opening bid turned down by Lecce. According to Fabrizio Romano, the Red Devils will soon lodge a new offer for the sought-after youngster. The post Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Will Red Devils sign Patrick Dorgu or Alvaro Fernandez before January deadline?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly giving serious consideration to re-signing Alvaro Fernandez from Benfica before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'It's normal': Man United told what Patrick Dorgu is thinking by Lecce boss before final week of the window

arts.ttl: Inter in Lecce to remain hot on the heels of Napoli
arts.sum: Inter are both the club with the most wins against Lecce in Serie A (29 of 37 matches, with four draws and four wins for the Salentini) and the team with the most goals scored (87) against the Giallorossi in the top-flight. Lecce have won only one of their last eight matches at the Via del Mare stadium against Inter in Serie A (D3 L4): 1-0 on 29th January 2012, with a goal by Guillermo Giacomazzi, under Serse Cosmi.

arts.ttl: Man United consider exercising £15m buy-back option on Alvaro Fernandez as club struggle to agree fee with Lecce for top target Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are weighing up whether to exercise their buy-back clause for Alvaro Fernandez at Benfica if they can't agree a fee for Lecce's Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Roma’s Pursuit of Frattesi: Inter’s Starting XI Decision Adds New Twist
arts.sum: The ongoing transfer saga surrounding Davide Frattesi has taken an unexpected turn as Inter Milan prepares to start the midfielder in their upcoming match against Lecce. This development comes amidst intense speculation linking Frattesi with a move to Roma before the January transfer window closes.
